text:
There once was an elderly man named Old Harold. Harold loved reading. One day he stumbled across an old book entitled "Whispers of Willowbrook." Intrigued, Harold began reading. Suddenly, the book told him a story.

In Willowbrook lived a cat named Whiskerton. Whiskerton loved mystery more than anything. One sunny afternoon Whiskerton discovered a peculiar thing. A bone had been stolen from his favorite hiding spot near the pond.

Whiskerton pondered. Who could have done such a thing? His thoughts turned wicked. Maybe it was someone from his own cat family. Perhaps an owl?

The following night, Whiskerton lay quietly on his favorite perch. His eyes twitched. Yes! It was his old buddy Old Mittens. She loved mice. Tonight was going to be fun!

As twilight descended, Whiskerton pounced. Old Mittens didn't see him coming. Just before he struck, Whiskerton pretended to slip. They rolled about
